	Si possible, réduis au maximum les expressions suivantes.
	\begin{enumerate}[cols=3]
		\item \(-b -b\)
		\item \(4a \cdot (-b)\)
		\item \(-5a\cdot (-5a)\)
		\item \(3a + 5b - 5a - 9b\)
		\item \(10x \cdot 3y\)
		\item \(b^2 + 3b^2\)
		\item \(e \cdot e \cdot f^3 \cdot 2e^3f\)
		\item \(5x + 3\)
		\item \(7x^2 + 8x \cdot (-2x)\)
		\item \(-2a + a \)
		\item \(10xy + 6x - 9y \cdot (-5x)\)
		\item \(b^2 + 5b\)
		\item \(a + a + a \)
		\item \(2b - 6b + 4a\)
		\item \(b^2 - 5b^2\)
		\item \(a \cdot (-2b)\cdot (-3c)\)
		\item \(-2b + 5b\)
		\item \(2a \cdot (-5b)\)
		\item \(x-2y + 3x - 5y\)
		\item \(4x + 2xy - 10\)
	\end{enumerate}
